publishedAbstract: - Pods mounting CephFS volumes get *Permission denied* errors- Network disruption followed by client eviction which results in the mount point being in accessible because of 'Permission Denied'.- Pod using cephfs PV fails to start- *CreateContainerError*: *failed to resolve symlink*: *lstat*: *permission denied* ~~~ Error: failed to resolve symlink "/var/lib/kubelet/pods/44xxxxxb-8xx3-4xx3-8xx1-cxxxxxxx2/volumes/kubernetes.io~csi/pvc-axxxxb-6xx1-4xx4-bxxa-0xxxxxxxxxf/mount": lstat /var/lib/kubelet/pods/44xxxxxb-8xx3-4xx3-8xx1-cxxxxxxxx92/volumes/kubernetes.io~csi/pvc-abxxxxxb-6xx1-4xx4-bxxa-0xxxxxxf/mount: permission denied ~~~- This issue is related only to cephfs, BUT NOT to ceph-rbd
publishedTitle: Network disconnection cause ceph mounts to fail with 'Permission denied' errors
